# nüll.

nüll. is a Mannheim-based web design and digital acquisition studio for professional service businesses, consultants, law firms, and local companies in Germany.

## Website
- Canonical domain: https://xn--nll-hoa.com
- Brand spelling: nüll.
- Location: Mannheim, Germany
- Contact email: info@nüll.com
- WhatsApp: +49 1525 6569852

## Primary Pages
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/ - Main landing page for websites, SEO, Google Ads, AI search visibility, branding, and content creation.
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/kanzlei-websites - Dedicated landing page for modern Kanzlei-Websites focused on local visibility and Mandatsanfragen.
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/leistungen/webdesign - Webdesign service page for Dienstleister, Kanzleien, Berater, Handwerk, and local companies.
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/leistungen/seo - SEO service page for local visibility, search-intent structure, and qualified organic enquiries.
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/leistungen/google-ads - Google Ads service page for campaign setup, landing pages, and conversion tracking.
- https://xn--nll-hoa.com/blog - Articles about web design, SEO, conversion, and digital positioning.

## Services
- Kanzlei-Websites for lawyers, law firms, tax advisors, and consultants who need trust, local visibility, and Mandatsanfragen.
- Conversion-focused websites with clear structure and premium visual direction.
- Local SEO and search-intent page architecture for qualified organic visibility.
- Google Ads campaign setup, landing pages, and conversion tracking.
- AI search visibility and digital positioning for expert-led businesses.
- Brand, content, and trust-building systems for lead generation.

## Technical Notes
- Framework: React Router 7 with Vite.
- Rendering: SSR-enabled React application with static public SEO files.
- Sitemap: https://xn--nll-hoa.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://xn--nll-hoa.com/robots.txt

## Positioning
nüll. builds digital presences that help visitors quickly understand expertise, trust the provider, and take the next step toward a qualified inquiry.
